description: Max-width page wrapper that centers content horizontally. Use on main, section, or div to constrain content width and center it on wide screens.

data-center.agent_hint: Sets max-width: sm=640px, md=960px, lg=1200px, xl=1440px, full=100%.

content.agent_hint: Any page-level content to be centered within the max-width.

do: Use on semantic container elements: main, section, article
Use data-center=lg for standard page content (1200px max)
Use data-center=md for narrower reading layouts like blog posts
Nest data-stack or data-grid inside for inner layout
dont: Do not set inline max-width or margin: auto manually
Do not use on inline elements
